pat_scheme_indirect_price.notes: PAT scheme ESCerts provide indirect carbon-equivalent price through energy efficiency trading, but oversupply has depressed prices

carbon_pricing.scheme_name: Carbon Credit Trading Scheme (CCTS) - Power sector NOT initially covered
carbon_pricing.notes: MAJOR UPDATE: Coal cess of ₹400/tonne abolished September 22, 2025 (56th GST Council). Replaced with higher GST (5%→18%) but net effect is tax REDUCTION for power generation. CCTS framework notified June 2023 explicitly excludes power sector initially. PAT scheme provides minimal indirect carbon price (~$2-3/tCO2e) through energy efficiency certificates but is not a direct carbon price. Gujarat state carbon market under development.
carbon_pricing.source: PIB Release PRID 2169438, 2165754; CERC Order 10/SM/2025; BEE; ICAP; verified January 2026

gas_ccgt.notes: Economically unviable due to LNG import dependency

coal.notes: New coal tariffs now higher than Firm Dispatchable RE

coal_existing_variable.notes: Variable cost for existing coal plants

lcoe_benchmarks.notes: India has world's lowest solar installed costs at $525/kW. Gas CCGT economically unviable due to LNG import dependency. New coal tariffs now higher than Firm Dispatchable RE.
lcoe_benchmarks.source: IRENA Renewable Power Generation Costs 2024; SECI auction results; Ember Energy 2025; CERC tariff orders

national_targets.notes: 50% non-fossil capacity target achieved 5 years early (Sept 2025). India opposes coal phase-out; 80 GW new coal planned by 2031-32. RE generation share lags capacity share due to lower capacity factors.
national_targets.source: India Updated NDC (UNFCCC August 2022); COP26 Panchamrit; Union Minister Parliament statement March 2025

grid_context.electricity_market_structure: Regulated market with wholesale exchanges; ~93% long-term PPAs, ~7% exchange trading; CERC/SERC regulated
grid_context.notes: Coal below 50% of capacity but above 70% of generation due to higher plant load factors (~69% vs ~19% for solar). Three power exchanges operate: IEX, PXIL, HPX.
grid_context.source: CEA CO2 Baseline Database V20.0; Ministry of Power; CERC Power Market Regulations 2021
